Our Services

End-to-End Textile Recycling Solutions

From collection and sorting to processing and delivery, we handle every step of the fiber recycling process so you don't have to.

Home / Services
What We Offer

Services Built Around Your Needs

Whether you need to offload textile waste or source quality recycled fibers, we have the capabilities and experience to deliver.

Fiber Processing

Our core service. We take raw textile waste and transform it into clean, graded, ready-to-use fibers through mechanical processing. From opening and cleaning to blending and baling, we handle it all.

View Details

Waste Collection & Logistics

We coordinate the pickup, transportation, and receiving of textile waste from your facility. Scheduled or on-demand collection keeps your operation running smoothly.

View Details

Custom Blending & Grading

Need a specific fiber composition? We create custom blends and grades to your exact specifications, ensuring consistent quality for your manufacturing process.

View Details
How It Works

Our Recycling Process

A proven, systematic approach to transforming textile waste into high-quality recycled fibers.

1

Collection & Receiving

We collect textile waste directly from your facility or receive shipments at our processing plant. All incoming materials are documented and inspected upon arrival.

2

Sorting & Classification

Materials are sorted by fiber type, color, and quality. This critical step ensures the right materials go into the right processing streams for optimal output quality.

3

Mechanical Processing

Sorted materials are opened, cleaned, and processed through our equipment. Fibers are separated, contaminants removed, and material is prepared for its next use.

4

Blending & Quality Control

Processed fibers are blended to meet customer specifications. Every batch undergoes quality checks to ensure consistency in fiber length, cleanliness, and composition.

5

Baling & Delivery

Finished fibers are compressed into bales for efficient storage and transport. We coordinate delivery to your facility on your schedule.

Core Service

Fiber Processing

Our state-of-the-art processing facility handles a wide range of textile waste materials, transforming them into clean, graded fibers that are ready for reuse in manufacturing.

  • Cotton, polyester, nylon, and blended fiber processing
  • Mechanical opening, cleaning, and fiber separation
  • Color sorting and contamination removal
  • Consistent output quality with batch-level documentation
  • Scalable capacity to match your volume requirements
Discuss Your Requirements
Logistics

Waste Collection & Transportation

Getting your textile waste to us shouldn't be a headache. Our collection service handles the logistics so you can stay focused on your core business.

  • Scheduled recurring pickups or on-demand collection
  • Containerized collection for easy loading at your facility
  • Regional coverage throughout the Northeast
  • Waste stream documentation and reporting
  • Help meeting your waste diversion and sustainability targets
Schedule a Pickup
Tailored Solutions

Custom Blending & Grading

Not all fibers are created equal, and neither are your requirements. We work with you to develop custom fiber products that meet your exact production specifications.

  • Custom fiber blends by composition, color, and staple length
  • Multiple grade levels to match your quality requirements
  • Sample runs and testing before full production
  • Consistent batch-to-batch quality
  • Technical consultation on fiber selection and performance
Request a Custom Quote

Have a Unique Fiber Need?

We've been solving fiber challenges for over a century. Tell us what you need, and we'll find a way to deliver.
